message:
feat(demo,runtime): final polish for demo screens and BOCPD tuning

Final round of polish and tuning for the demo screens and BOCPD detector.

dashboard.rs:
- Add interactive chart controls (zoom, pan, reset)
- Implement data export functionality
- Add chart type switching (line, bar, area)
- Improve tooltip formatting
- Add chart legend toggle

shakespeare.rs:
- Expand play content with additional acts
- Add character list sidebar
- Implement scene summary view
- Add theatrical notes and stage directions
- Support custom text styling themes
- Add bookmark functionality for favorite passages

bocpd.rs tuning:
- Adjust default hazard rate for better sensitivity
- Improve run-length probability normalization
- Add diagnostic counters for debugging
- Fine-tune changepoint detection thresholds
- Add comments documenting parameter choices

These changes complete the feature set for the initial release
and ensure consistent behavior across all demo scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
